reasons: Trading on broad-market drift with no stock-specific catalysts
Dependable dividend score offers limited cushion
risks: No clear near-term catalyst to counter selling
Broad-market weakness could drag the stock
short_term.what_would_change_view: A positive catalyst or revision to the disclosure tone would upgrade the view; a sharper drop or extended cautious language would move it to negative

reasons: Execution remains an open but manageable question
risks: Macro conditions remain a key swing factor
